-  CTLineBreakMode.byTruncatingHead 

Case# CTLineBreakMode.byTruncatingHead

iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
case byTruncatingHead
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/ctlinebreakmode/bytruncatinghead#Discussion)

Each line is displayed so that the end fits in the frame and the missing text is indicated by an ellipsis glyph.
